title: Coherent, Inc. Reports First Fiscal Quarter Results
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif., Feb. 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Coherent, Inc. (NASDAQ, COHR), one of the world's leading providers of lasers, laser-based technologies and laser-based system solutions in a broad range of scientific, commercial and industrial applications, today announced financial results for its first fiscal quarter ended January 1, 2022.

title: II-VI Incorporated's (IIVI) CEO Chuck Mattera on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: II-VI Incorporated's (IIVI) CEO Chuck Mattera on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: II-VI Shares Drop On Q2 Earnings Miss, Weaker Outlook; Provides Update On Coherent
text: II-VI Inc IIVI reported second-quarter FY22 revenue growth of 2.6% year-on-year to $806.8 million, missing the consensus of $816.97 million. Segments: Photonic Solutions revenue increased 8.7% Y/Y to $525 million.

title: Analysts Estimate II-VI (IIVI) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: II-VI (IIVI) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
